§6Quartz Crucible§f:
The §6Quartz Crucible §f(advancedrocketry:iquartzcrucible) is a §emultiblock processing machine §f that §bmelts §6silicon-bearing materials §f into §bmolten silicon §f for §6wafer production §f. It is the §6first machine §f in the §6silicon-processing pipeline §f of Advanced Rocketry.

§6Production Path§f:
- The §6Quartz Crucible §f is a §6multiblock machine §f with no §6direct §fcrafting recipe
- Crafted via the §6Crafting Table §f from §6components §f — see the §6Crafting Table §f quest
- §eTip§f: check §6JEI §f for the §bcurrent §f recipe in your pack
- Yields 1× Quartz Crucible

§6Function§f:
- §bMelting §f: melts §6quartz §f, §6sand §f, and §6silicon-bearing materials §f into §6molten silicon §f
- §bTemperature §f: heats to §b1,800°C §f — far hotter than a §6vanilla Furnace §f
- §bPower §f: §b500 RF/t §f at idle, scales with throughput
- §bMultiblock §f: 3×3×3 hollow cube with §6Structure Towers §f on the corners
- §bInput/Output §f: §6Liquid IO Circuit Boards §f on §binner faces §f handle fluid I/O
- §bAutomation §f: pair with §6Liquid IO §f to feed §6molten silicon §f into a §6Crystallizer §f

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Quartz Crucible is a component of, but it is referenced in 15 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bMolten silicon production §f: feed §6Crystallizer §f

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: use a §6Liquid IO §f to §6feed §f the crucible from a §6tank §f
- §eTip§f: pair the §6Quartz Crucible §f with a §6Crystallizer §f for §bautomated §fsilicon production
- §cWarning§f: the §6Quartz Crucible §f must be §bheated §fto §boperating temperature §f before melting begins; it can take §bseveral minutes §f
- §cWarning§f: a §6quench §f (water on the crucible) will §cdamage §f the block; never place water above it
